# Let's open the provided JSON files and inspect their schema.
import json, os, sys, re, unicodedata, math
from difflib import SequenceMatcher

quran_path = "/mnt/data/file-MVgj1ZkxaQMvFkdZLobLET-quranic_verses.json"
hadith_path = "/mnt/data/file-Ly1VfrnGpghzcoaXtbANNv-six_hadith_books.json"

with open(quran_path, 'r', encoding='utf-8') as f:
    quran = json.load(f)

len(quran), type(quran)[:10] if isinstance(quran, list) else type(quran)

with open(hadith_path, 'r', encoding='utf-8') as f:
    hadith = json.load(f)

len(hadith), type(hadith)[:10] if isinstance(hadith, list) else type(hadith)

import re, unicodedata
from difflib import SequenceMatcher

# Normalization functions
arabic_diacritics = re.compile(r'[\u0610-\u061A\u064B-\u065F\u06D6-\u06ED]')
tatweel = re.compile(r'[\u0640]')
punc = re.compile(r'[^\w\s\u0600-\u06FF]')  # remove non-arabic punctuation; keep arabic letters/numbers and underscore; adjust later
spaces = re.compile(r'\s+')

def normalize_ar(s):
    if s is None:
        return ''
    s = str(s)
    # remove diacritics
    s = arabic_diacritics.sub('', s)
    # normalize different alef forms to alif
    s = s.replace('أ', 'ا').replace('إ', 'ا').replace('آ','ا').replace('ٱ','ا')
    # normalize hamza-on-chair to bare hamza? We'll remove hamza completely for easier search
    s = s.replace('ؤ','و').replace('ئ','ي').replace('ء','')
    # normalize ta marbuta to ha
    s = s.replace('ة','ه')
    # normalize alif maqsurah
    s = s.replace('ى','ي')
    # remove tatweel
    s = tatweel.sub('', s)
    # remove punctuation (keep Arabic digits and letters)
    s = punc.sub(' ', s)
    # collapse spaces
    s = spaces.sub(' ', s).strip()
    return s

def token_f1(a, b):
    ta = normalize_ar(a).split()
    tb = normalize_ar(b).split()
    if not ta and not tb:
        return 1.0
    from collections import Counter
    ca = Counter(ta)
    cb = Counter(tb)
    # compute overlap counts
    overlap = 0
    for t, va in ca.items():
        if t in cb:
            overlap += min(va, cb[t])
    prec = overlap / (sum(ca.values()) + 1e-9)
    rec = overlap / (sum(cb.values()) + 1e-9)
    if prec+rec == 0:
        return 0.0
    f1 = 2*prec*rec/(prec+rec)
    return f1

def seq_ratio(a, b):
    a_norm = normalize_ar(a)
    b_norm = normalize_ar(b)
    return SequenceMatcher(None, a_norm, b_norm).ratio()

# Build normalized texts for Quran and hadith
for v in quran:
    v['ayah_text_norm'] = normalize_ar(v['ayah_text'])

for h in hadith:
    matn = h.get('Matn') or ''
    ht = h.get('hadithTxt') or ''
    h['text'] = matn if matn else ht
    h['text_norm'] = normalize_ar(h['text'])

full_substring = "وَلَقَدْ أَرَيْنَاهُ آيَاتِنَا فَكَذَّبَهَا وَكَذَّبَ الآخَرِينَ بَعْدَهُ وَمَا تُبْسَطُ يَدَايَ إِلَى ظِمَاهِهِمْ وَمَا تَنَالُهُ عُقْدَةٌ مِنْ أَمْرِهِمْ إِنِ اِنتَهَوا إِلَى التَّوْبَةِ يُتُبْ عَلَيْهِمْ وَإِن تَذَهَبا فَمَا تَزِدُ الْخَاسِرِينَ خَسَراً"
snippet = "وَلَقَدْ أ...نَ خَسَراً"

full_norm = normalize_ar(full_substring)
full_norm[:200], len(full_norm)

phrase = "اريناه اياتنا"
candidates = [v for v in quran if phrase in v['ayah_text_norm']]
len(candidates), [(v['surah_name'], v['ayah_id'], v['ayah_text']) for v in candidates[:10]]

candidate = candidates[0]
ratio = seq_ratio(candidate['ayah_text'], full_substring)
f1 = token_f1(candidate['ayah_text'], full_substring)
ratio, f1

phrase2 = "تزد الخاسرين خسرا"
[(v['surah_name'], v['ayah_id'], v['ayah_text']) for v in quran if phrase2 in v['ayah_text_norm']][:10]

# List top 10 Quran matches
top_q = sorted(((combined_similarity(v['ayah_text'], full_substring), v) for v in quran), key=lambda x: x[0], reverse=True)[:10]
[(score, v['surah_name'], v['ayah_id'], v['ayah_text']) for score, v in top_q]

# Find best hadith match
best_h = None
best_h_score = -1
for h in hadith:
    s = combined_similarity(h['text'], full_substring)
    if s > best_h_score:
        best_h_score = s
        best_h = h
best_h_score, best_h['title'][:80], best_h['text'][:120]
[(v['surah_name'], v['ayah_id'], v['ayah_text']) for v in quran if "فَكَذَّبَهَا" in v['ayah_text'] or "فكذبها" in v['ayah_text_norm']]

ghafir85 = [v for v in quran if v['surah_name'] == 'غافر' and v['ayah_id'] == 85]
ghafir85
